events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the field condition (press force transmitted through the rolling elements onto the wrong race during mounting) is a classic root cause of false/true brinelling per SKF/Timken guidance — force must go through the interference-fit ring only, never through the balls/rollers. Called `fail`, high risk, `degraded`/`failed` conditions, with corrective actions (remove/inspect for pitch-spaced raceway dents, replace bearing, re-mount correctly, retrain fitters).
